response.justification: Candidate is an excellent full-stack engineer with 20+ years of experience, but critically misaligned with the role's core requirements. The position mandates 5–10 years of professional C++ on Windows with SQL Server/Oracle expertise and capital-markets domain knowledge; this resume shows only ~6 months of C++ work, no Windows platform experience, MySQL/MongoDB rather than enterprise SQL databases, and minimal fintech exposure (1.3 years at a single FinTech startup with unclear capital-markets involvement). While the candidate could theoretically develop these skills, the role expects mid-senior-level immediate productivity in a specialized domain.
strengths: Exceptional general software engineering depth with 20+ years across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Strong mentorship and communication demonstrated through multiple workshops, talks, and open-source community leadership
Proven ability to rapidly master new technology stacks and drive architecture decisions across diverse platforms
concerns: Critically insufficient C++ experience: only ~6 months of professional work versus the mandatory 5–10 years required
No Windows platform development background; career is heavily centered on Linux, Node.js, and web ecosystems
No fixed-income, derivatives, or investment-banking domain expertise; only 1.3 years tangential fintech exposure at RIDE Capital

key_factors.factor: Capital Markets / Fixed Income domain knowledge (required)
